current_entries.en_definition: A thin layer of some substance; a pellicle; a membranous covering, causing opacity.

current_entries.en_definition: (photography) A medium used to capture images in a camera.

A device which separates a suspended, dissolved, or particulate matter from a fluid, solution, or other substance; any device that separates one substance from another.
Electronics or software that separates unwanted signals (for example noise) from wanted signals or that attenuates selected frequencies.
Any item, mechanism, device, or procedure that acts to separate or isolate.
(intransitive) To move slowly or gradually; to come or go a few at a time.
At the end or conclusion; ultimately.

current_entries.en_definition: At bottom; ultimately; when all is considered.
The science of management of money and other assets.
(usually, in the plural) Monetary resources, especially those of a public entity or a company.
(transitive) To manage financially; be financier for; provide or obtain funding for a transaction or undertaking.
(music, uncountable) The act of using one's fingers in the playing of a musical instrument.
(music, countable) A specific method of using the fingers to play an instrument.
Having an end or limit; (of a quantity) constrained by bounds; (of a set) whose number of elements is a natural number.
(grammar) Limited by (i.e. inflected for) person or number. [from 19th c.]
A fennel cultivar with a bulb-like structure at its base, used as a vegetable; Florence fennel (Foeniculum vulgare var. azoricum).
(derogatory, slang) A gay man.

The profession of being a firefighter.

The field or sphere of an activity or interest.
A number of places in the United States:

examples.english: He's a fisher.

current_entries.en_definition: A suburb of the City of Mount Isa, Queensland, Australia.
A sea area centered on the Fisher Bank off the west coast of Denmark.
A person who catches fish, especially for a living or for sport; a person engaging in the pastime of fishing.
A fisher, a person engaged in fishing:
A person whose profession is catching fish.
(uncountable, informal) The act of catching other forms of seafood, separately or together with fish.

The act of fixing.
(legal) Recording a creative work in a medium of expression for more than a transitory duration, thereby satisfying the "fixation" requirement for the purposes of copyright law.
A genre of folk music and dance native to Andalusia, in Spain.

Capable of burning.

examples.english: That is flammable.

current_entries.en_definition: Easily set on fire.
Subject to easy ignition and rapid flaming combustion.
A historical county of Western Europe; in full, County of Flanders.
A region of Belgium. Official name: Flemish Region.
A community of Belgium. Official name: Flemish Community.
Two provinces in Belgian Flanders, West Flanders and East Flanders.
Ellipsis of French Flanders: a former province of France.
Ellipsis of French Flanders: a region of France.
The fibers of Linum usitatissimum, grown to make linen and related textiles.
A flax bush, a plant of the genus Phormium, native to New Zealand, with strap-like leaves up to 3 metres long that grow in clumps.
Capable of being flexed or bent without breaking; able to be turned or twisted without breaking.
Willing or prone to give way to the influence of others; not invincibly rigid or obstinate.
Capable of adapting or changing to suit new or modified conditions or situations.
Capable or being adapted or molded in some way.
A city and comune, the capital of the Metropolitan City of Florence and the region of Tuscany, Italy.

examples.english: Florence is the most beautiful city in Italy.

current_entries.en_definition: A metropolitan city of Tuscany, established in 2015; in full, the Metropolitan City of Florence.
Influenza.

examples.english: I've got a touch of the flu.
examples.chinese: 我有點流感。

current_entries.en_definition: (informal) Stomach flu.
In a fluent manner, as expressing oneself easily, especially in a foreign language.

examples.english: If only I could speak English as fluently as you!
examples.chinese: 如果我說英語能說得跟你一樣流利的話就好了!

current_entries.en_definition: In a fluent manner, as having graceful movements.
Any of many kinds of birds of the family Muscicapidae, of Africa, Europe, and Asia, that catch insects in flight; an Old World flycatcher.
Any of many kinds of similar birds of various families, such as Tyrannidae (the New World flycatchers of the Americas), Tityridae, Stenostiridae, Monarchidae, Petroicidae, etc.

Any genre of music originating from the ethnic community of a specific region, often passed down through oral tradition, without recorded songwriters and possessing a clear purpose or social function.
Any contemporary music in the style of traditional folk music, especially a specific genre of originally American popular music that draws on Anglo-American musical forms.
The state of being foolish.
A thing or event that is foolish, or an absurdity.
The ball used in any game called "football".

(UK, Africa, Caribbean, South Asia, uncountable) Association football, also called soccer: a game in which two teams each contend to get a round ball into the other team's goal primarily by kicking the ball.
The impression of the foot in a soft substance such as sand or snow.
(figurative, in the plural) What a person has done before, as a profession or lifestyle, serving as a model for others.
Located outside a country or place, especially one's own.

examples.english: You seem to be prejudiced against ideas that come from foreign countries.

current_entries.en_definition: Originating from, characteristic of, belonging to, or being a citizen of a country or place other than the one under discussion.
Relating to a different nation.
Belonging to a different organization, company etc.
Not characteristic of or naturally taken in by an organism or system.
The science of planting and growing trees in forests.
The art and practice of planting and growing trees in forests.
(transitive) To lose remembrance of.

Abandoned, deserted, left behind.
Pitifully sad, wretched, miserable; lonely, especially from feeling abandoned, deserted, forsaken.
at some time in the past

examples.english: Formerly this building was a hospital.

current_entries.en_definition: previously; once
(mathematics) Any mathematical rule expressed symbolically.

The state of being fortuitous.
A fortuitous event; an accident.
Destiny, especially favorable.
A large amount of money.
Good luck.
A place for discussion.
A gathering for the purpose of discussion; a symposium.
A form of discussion involving a panel of presenters and often participation by members of the audience.

A former unit of currency of France, Belgium and Luxembourg, replaced by the euro.
Any of several units of currency, some of which are multi-national (West African CFA Franc (XOF), Central African CFA Franc (XAF), the Swiss franc (CHF)) while others are national currencies.
A en given name.
(rare) A en given name, alternative spelling of Frances.
The largest city in Hesse, in central Germany; in full, Frankfurt am Main.
A sizable town in Brandenburg, in eastern Germany; in full, Frankfurt an der Oder.
Of or pertaining to the Franks.
In or of the language of the Franks.
An appliance or room used to store food or other perishable items at temperatures below 0° Celsius (32° Fahrenheit).
The section of a refrigerator used to store food or other perishable items at a temperature below 0° Celsius (32° Fahrenheit).
(organic compound) Any of several nonflammable refrigerants based on halogenated hydrocarbon including R-12, R-22, and R-23.
(informal, refrigeration) A gaseous ozone-depleting refrigerant.
(uncountable, or, countable) The rate of occurrence of anything; the relationship between incidence and time period.

examples.chinese: 最近频繁的地震让我们很焦虑。

current_entries.en_definition: The property of occurring often rather than infrequently.
The quotient of the number of times n a periodic phenomenon occurs over the time t in which it occurs: f = n / t.
A canton of Switzerland. (the French name)
The capital city of Fribourg canton, Switzerland. (the French name)
The rubbing of one object or surface against another.
(physics) A force that resists the relative motion or tendency to such motion of two bodies in contact.
A kind of coarse woollen cloth or stuff with a shaggy or tufted (friezed) nap on one side.

(architecture) That part of the entablature of an order which is between the architrave and cornice. It is a flat member or face, either uniform or broken by triglyphs, and often enriched with figures and other ornaments of sculpture.
(by extension) Any sculptured or richly ornamented band in a building or in rich pieces of furniture.
A disk-shaped gliding toy, sold under the brand name Frisbee.
(sports, uncountable) frisbee: the sport involving Frisbees.

Of, from or relating to the region of Frisia: Either West Frisia (the Dutch province of Friesland); North Frisia (in the German state of Schleswig-Holstein, near the Danish border); or East Frisia (in the German state of Lower Saxony, near the Dutch border).
A member of the Germanic ethnic group which is native to the region of Frisia (which is in the Netherlands, northern Germany, and southern Denmark).
(specifically) The West Frisian (or Western Frisian) lect, spoken in the northern Netherlands.
A Germanic language group or language (see Usage notes), or a lect thereof, which descended from Old Frisian, with speakers in the Netherlands, Germany and Denmark.
The feeling of annoyance at impossibility from resistance or inability to achieve something.
The act of frustrating, or the state, or an instance of being frustrated.
A popular garden plant, of the genus Fuchsia, of the Onagraceae family, shrubs with red, pink or purple flowers.
A purplish-red colour, the color of fuchsin, an aniline dye.
(dismissal) Go away! Get lost!
An expression of disagreement or disbelief.
To go to hell; to disappear or go away; to screw oneself.
A convex, rounded or grooved tool, used by blacksmiths for shaping metal.
A groove made by such a tool (in the blade of a sword etc.).
In a full manner; without lack or defect; completely, entirely.

examples.english: To share one's passion is to live it fully.
examples.chinese: 分享激情，就是完全沉浸在里面。

current_entries.en_definition: (rare) So as to be full (not hungry); to satiation.
The hairy skins of animals used as a material for clothing.
A coating or lining resembling fur in function and/or appearance.
(transitive, figuratively) To supply or give (something).
(transitive, figuratively) To supply (somebody) with something.
(comparative form of far) More distant; relatively distant.

examples.english: You will find it stated a few pages further on.

current_entries.en_definition: (comparative form of far) To a greater extent or degree.
(conjunctive) Also; in addition; furthermore; moreover.

(cytology) The process by which two distinct lipid bilayers merge their hydrophobic core, resulting in one interconnected structure.

examples.english: Jazz fusion is a combination of rock and jazz.
examples.chinese: 融合爵士是搖滾樂與爵士樂的融合。

current_entries.en_definition: (fiction) The act of two characters merging into one, typically more powerful, being; or the merged being itself.
(genetics) The result of the hybridation of two genes which originally coded for separate proteins.
(physics) A nuclear reaction in which nuclei combine to form more massive nuclei with the concomitant release of energy.
The act of melting or liquefying something by heating it.
(ecology) The ecosystem of the Earth regarded as a self-regulating superorganism. [from 20th c.]
(Greek goddess) A Greek goddess, the personification of the earth, and one of the primordial deities from whom all the others descend.
Of, from or relating to Galicia, Spain.
Of or pertaining to the Galician language.
A native or inhabitant of Galicia, Spain.
The language of Galicia; a Romance language spoken in the northwestern corner of the Iberian peninsula.
A person who plays any kind of game.
A person whose hobby is video games.
A person who games the system.
A carved grotesque figure on a spout which conveys water away from the gutters.
Any decorative carved grotesque figure on a building.
A fictional winged monster.
Any point that represents the beginning of a transition from one place or phase to another.
A point at which freight moving from one territory to another is interchanged between transportation lines.

(computing, networking, telecommunications) In wireless internet, an access point with additional software capabilities such as providing NAT and DHCP, which may also provide VPN support, roaming, firewalls, various levels of security, etc.
A protein derived through partial hydrolysis of the collagen extracted from animal skin, bones, cartilage, ligaments, etc.
An edible jelly made from this material.
A thin, translucent membrane used as a filter for photography or for theatrical lighting effects.
A castrated male horse.
Any castrated male animal.
(obsolete) Class; kind. [14th–19th c.]

Identification as a man, a woman, or something else, and association with a (social) role or set of behavioral and cultural traits, clothing, etc; a category to which a person belongs on this basis. (Compare gender role, gender identity.) [from 20th c.]

(grammar) A division of nouns and pronouns (and sometimes of other parts of speech) into masculine or feminine, and sometimes other categories like neuter or common, and animate or inanimate. [from 14th c.]
The descent of a person, family, or group from an ancestor or ancestors; lineage or pedigree.
A record or table of such descent; a family tree.
The study, and formal recording of such descents.
The trait of being willing to donate money, resources, or time.

examples.english: I had great admiration for his generosity.
examples.chinese: 我很钦佩他的慷慨大方。

current_entries.en_definition: A generous act.
(archaic, uncountable) Good breeding; nobility of stock.
(Islam) A jinn, a being descended from the jann, normally invisible to the human eye, but who may also appear in animal or human form.
(mythological creature) A fictional magical being that is typically bound to obey the commands of a mortal possessing its container.
A port city and comune, the capital of the Metropolitan City of Genoa and the region of Liguria, Italy.

examples.english: He comes from Genoa.
examples.chinese: 他从热那亚来。

current_entries.en_definition: A metropolitan city of Liguria, established in 2015; in full, the Metropolitan City of Genoa.

Any well-bred, well-mannered, or charming man.

examples.english: Who is that gentleman in spectacles?
examples.chinese: 那位戴眼鏡的男士是誰？

current_entries.en_definition: (chiefly, _, historical) A man of gentle but not noble birth, particularly a man of means (originally ownership of property) who does not work for a living but has no official status in a peerage; (UK, _, law) an armigerous man ranking below a knight.
(mathematics, uncountable) The branch of mathematics dealing with spatial relationships.

The observed or specified spatial attributes of an object, etc.
Of, from, or pertaining to the Eastern European country of Georgia, the Georgian people or the Georgian language.
A person or a descendant of a person from Georgia, a country in Eastern Europe and Western Asia.
A native or resident of the state of Georgia in the United States of America.
The language of Georgia, a country in Eastern Europe and Western Asia.
(strictly) Any flowering plant of the genus Geranium, of family Geraniaceae.

examples.english: The red geranium is very beautiful.
examples.chinese: 红色天竺葵很美。

current_entries.en_definition: A bright red color tinted with orange, like that of a scarlet geranium (Pelargonium inquinans) .
(biology) The small mass of cells from which a part of an organism develops, or a macroscopic but immature form of that part; a bud.
The embryo of a seed, especially of a seed used as a cereal or grain. See Wikipedia article on cereal germ.
A pathogen: a pathogenic microorganism, such as a bacterium or virus.
(figurative) The origin or earliest version of an idea or project.
Of or relating to the natives or inhabitants of Germany; to people of German descent; to their cultures.

examples.english: When did you begin learning German?
examples.chinese: 你什麼時候開始學習德文?

current_entries.en_definition: A native or inhabitant of Germany; a person of German citizenship or nationality.
A member of the Germanic ethnic group which is the most populous ethnic group in Germany; a person of German descent.
An Indo-European (Indo-Germanic) language, primarily spoken in Germany, Austria, Liechtenstein, South Tyrol, Switzerland, Luxembourg, and a small part of Belgium.
A number of townships in the United States, listed under German Township.
(transitive) To give a German character to (something).
(intransitive) To adopt German customs or culture.
(intransitive, botany, horticulture) Of a seed, to begin to grow, to sprout roots and leaves.
(transitive) To cause to grow; to produce.

(grammar) A verbal form that functions as a verbal noun. (In English, a gerund has the same spelling as a present participle, but functions differently; however, this distinction may be ambiguous or unclear and so is no longer made in some modern texts such as A Comprehensive Grammar of the English Language and The Cambridge Grammar of the English Language)

(grammar) In some languages such as Dutch, Italian or Russian, a verbal form similar to a present participle, but functioning as an adverb to form adverbial phrases or continuous tense. These constructions have various names besides gerund, depending on the language, such as conjunctive participles, active participles, adverbial participles, transgressives, etc.
(archaic) A story or adventure; a verse or prose romance.
(obsolete) A gesture or action.
Very large.

examples.english: Giant pandas live only in China.
examples.chinese: 大熊猫只住在中国里。

current_entries.en_definition: A mythical human of very great size.
Any of the gigantes, the race of giants in the Greek mythology.
A very tall and large person.
(astronomy) A star that is considerably more luminous than a main sequence star of the same temperature (e.g. red giant, blue giant).
Having the color or quality of gold.

examples.english: While the rest of us work hard, the robber barons eat with gilded utensils.
examples.chinese: 當我們其他人辛苦工作時，強盜貴族卻用鍍金餐具吃飯。

current_entries.en_definition: Made of gold or covered by a thin layer of gold.
Any plant of two species of the genus Panax (Panax ginseng and Panax quinquefolius), having forked roots supposed to have medicinal and aphrodisiac properties.
The root of such a plant, or an extract of these roots.
A female partner in an unmarried romantic relationship.

examples.english: You'll get into trouble if your girlfriend finds out the truth.
examples.chinese: 如果你女朋友发现真相的话，你会有麻烦的。

current_entries.en_definition: (LGBTQ) A fellow gay man, especially a friend as opposed to a sexual partner.
In a glad manner; happily.

examples.english: We gladly accept your offer.
examples.chinese: 我们很高兴接受你的提议。

current_entries.en_definition: Willingly; certainly.

(zoology) A specialized cell, group of cells, or organ of endothelial origin in the human or animal body that synthesizes a chemical substance, such as hormones or breast milk, and releases it, often into the bloodstream (endocrine gland) or into cavities inside the body or its outer surface (exocrine gland).
(botany) A secretory structure on the surface of an organ.
(anatomy) A structure at the extremity of the penis and of the clitoris in humans and other mammals.
The acorn or mast of the oak and similar fruits.
Any heavier-than-air aircraft optimised for unpowered flight; a sailplane.
A pilot of glider aircraft.
Concerning all parts of the world.
(not comparable, computing) Of a variable, accessible by all parts of a program.
Spherical, ball-shaped.
(not comparable) Of or relating to a globe or sphere.
The process of becoming a more interconnected world.
The process of the world economy becoming dominated by capitalist models, according to the World System Theory.
(carboxylic acid) N-phosphonomethyl glycine, the active ingredient of several herbicides that inhibit a plant growth enzyme.
Any of several herbicides based on it, such as Roundup.
(intransitive) To explode.
(intransitive, figurative) To explode metaphorically; to become very angry or overexcited.
A result that one is attempting to achieve.

examples.english: Our ultimate goal is to establish world peace.
examples.chinese: 我们的究极目标是树立世界和平。

current_entries.en_definition: (sport) In many sports, an area into which the players attempt to put an object.
(sport) The act of placing the object into the goal.
A point scored in a game as a result of placing the object into the goal.
A device used to measure angles.
A device used to measure the angles of crystals.
A radio direction finder.
Something or someone pleasant, fortunate, or otherwise positive.
(Christianity) The message of Jesus concerning the salvation of the faithful, as elaborated in the Gospels.
(informal, often, _, derogatory, sometimes, _, affectionate) A foolish or silly person or animal.
(informal, pharmaceutical drug) A pill or tablet containing a pharmaceutical which has hypnotic or intoxicating effects, especially a barbiturate.
(historical) A piece of armour protecting the throat and/or the upper part of the chest.
An ornament for the neck; a necklace, ornamental collar, torque etc.
Someone who likes to talk about other people's private or personal business.
Idle talk about someone’s private or personal matters, especially about someone not present.
(intransitive) To talk idly.
A hard-shelled fruit from a plant in Lagenaria or Cucurbita.
The dried and hardened shell of such fruit, made into a drinking vessel, bowl, spoon, or other objects designed for use or decoration.
(obsolete) Any of the climbing or trailing plants from the family Cucurbitaceae, which includes watermelon, pumpkins, and cucumbers.
(transitive) To make and administer the public policy and affairs of; to exercise sovereign authority in.
(intransitive) To exercise political authority; to run a government.

current_entries.zh_definition: 格拉福夫卡農村居民點
current_entries.en_definition: A settlement, the administrative centre of the rural settlement of the same name in Krasnaya Yaruga Raion, Belgorod Oblast, Central Federal District, Russia.

current_entries.zh_definition: 格拉福夫卡農村居民點
current_entries.en_definition: A village, the administrative centre of the rural settlement of the same name in Shebekino Raion, Belgorod Oblast, Central Federal District, Russia.
(colloquial, humorous) Grandpa, grandfather.
(by extension, derogatory) Old man.
(agriculture) A storage facility for grain or sometimes animal feed.
(figuratively) A fertile, grain-growing region.
Ruler or monarch of a grand duchy.
Son, daughter, or grandchild of a czar (emperor) of the Russian Empire. (A more literal translation of the Russian is grand prince.)
A father of someone's parent. [from 15th c.]

examples.english: Bob met her grandfather early in the morning.
examples.chinese: 清晨，鲍勃遇见了她的祖父。

current_entries.en_definition: (computing) The archived older version of a file that immediately preceded the father file.
A small, round, smooth-skinned edible fruit, usually purple, red, or green, that grows in bunches on vines of genus Vitis.

examples.english: I like grape jelly best.
examples.chinese: 我最喜歡吃葡萄果凍。

current_entries.en_definition: Any of various fruits or plants with varying resemblances to those of genus Vitis but belonging to other genera; their edibility varies.
Understanding.
That which is accessible; that which is within one's reach or ability.
To grip; to take hold, particularly with the hand.
To understand.
To take advantage of something, to seize, to jump at a chance.
(physics) The phenomenon that, on earth, objects have weight; the similar phenomenon on other celestial bodies such as the moon.
(loosely, see usage notes) Gravitation, the universal force exercised by two bodies on each other by virtue of their masses.
(physics) A law or laws of gravitation: any theory which attempts to account for the phenomena of weight and/or the mutual attraction of massive objects (Aristotelian gravity, Newtonian gravity).
A large island (sometimes also including some of the surrounding smaller islands) off the north-west coast of Western Europe, made up of England, Scotland, and Wales.
(loosely) The United Kingdom, a kingdom and country in Northern Europe including the island of Great Britain as well as Northern Ireland on the northeastern portion of the island of Ireland.
(politics, law) England, Scotland and Wales in combination, to the exclusion of Northern Ireland.
(sports) The United Kingdom national team (often inclusive of Northern Ireland).
An administrative region of England, combining the City of London and 32 London boroughs, including the City of Westminster, 3 Royal Boroughs and 28 London Boroughs.
A ceremonial county of England, combining all of the administrative region except the City of London, which is its own ceremonial county.
A traffic light in its green state (indicating that vehicles may proceed).
(idiomatic) Approval, or permission to proceed.

definition_alignment.chinese_definition: 綠茶 / 绿茶 ǜ chá

current_entries.zh_definition: 綠茶 / 绿茶 ǜ chá
current_entries.en_definition: Leaves of the tea plant which are treated with steam or roasted to denature the enzymes that cause the leaves to darken and change taste. (Without this step they would become oolong tea or black tea).

current_entries.zh_definition: 綠茶 / 绿茶 ǜ chá
current_entries.en_definition: A beverage brewed from green tea leaves.
(transitive) To arrive at or reach, or meet.

examples.english: I didn't greet you because I mistook you for somebody else.
examples.chinese: 我把你認成了別人，所以才沒有和你打招呼。

current_entries.en_definition: (transitive) To accost; to address.
A en given name.
A fictional character in the German fairy tale Hansel and Gretel.
(road transport) A condition of total, interlocking traffic congestion on the streets or highways of a crowded city, in which no one can move because everyone is in someone else's way.

On a smaller scale, the situation in which cars enter a signal-controlled intersection too late during the green light cycle, and are unable to clear the intersection (due to congestion in the next block) when the light turns red, thus blocking the cross traffic when it's their turn to go. Repeated at enough intersections, this phenomenon can lead to citywide gridlock.
(transitive, slang) To understand (something) intuitively, to know (something) without having to think intellectually.
(transitive, slang) To fully and completely understand something in all of its details and intricacies.
A province of Tuscany, Italy.
A city, the capital of Grosseto province, Tuscany.
(intransitive) To crawl.
(intransitive) To abase oneself before another person.
(intransitive) To be slavishly nice to someone or apologize in the hope of securing something.
(intransitive) To mature and become an adult.
(intransitive, idiomatic) To stop acting as or like a child (often used as an imperative interjection).
A city, the capital of Guadalajara, Spain.
A city, the capital of Jalisco, in central Mexico.
A tree, Paullinia cupana, native to Venezuela and northern Brazil.
The fruit from this tree, chiefly used to make caffeinated beverages.
(religion) A tutelary angel watching over a particular person in monotheistic contexts.
(figuratively) A person who benevolently watches over another.

(figurative) Marvellous; profoundly affecting; wonderful; excellent.

Not in keeping with conventional moral values; improper, immodest, or unseemly.

Weak, indecisive; lacking forcefulness.

(obsolete) The act of infatuating; the state of being infatuated; madness.
(pathology) The act or process of infecting.
An uncontrolled growth of harmful microorganisms in a host.

(medicine) An illness caused by a specific infectious agent (bacterium, virus, fungus, protozoa, prion etc.), that results from transmission of that agent from an infected person, animal, or reservoir to a susceptible host.
(medicine) A medical specialty dealing with the diagnosis, control and treatment of infections.
